reviews.comment:
Linda estación, lastima que a los extranjeros le limiten los lts de combustible a cargar (40lts max) y que le aumenten el precio. Parece que quieren correr a los extranjeros de su país.

(Translated by Google)
Nice station, it's a shame they limit the amount of fuel foreigners can buy (40 liters max) and raise the price. It seems like they want to drive foreigners out of their country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURleHVudTBBRRAB
